predefined_llm_result.rationale: The user requested 'Netzspannungen' (network voltages) for a bus entity. In power systems, 'Netzspannung' typically refers to line-to-line voltage (Leiter-Leiter), which corresponds to the predefined field 'voltage_ll'. The aliases for 'voltage_ll' include 'leiter leiter spannung' and 'spannung ll', matching the German term 'Netzspannungen'. 'voltage_ln' (Leiter-Erde) is incorrect as it refers to line-to-ground voltage, which is not the standard interpretation of 'Netzspannung'.

selection_debug.final_rationale: The user requested 'Netzspannungen' (network voltages) for a bus entity. In power systems, 'Netzspannung' typically refers to line-to-line voltage (Leiter-Leiter), which corresponds to the predefined field 'voltage_ll'. The aliases for 'voltage_ll' include 'leiter leiter spannung' and 'spannung ll', matching the German term 'Netzspannungen'. 'voltage_ln' (Leiter-Erde) is incorrect as it refers to line-to-ground voltage, which is not the standard interpretation of 'Netzspannung'.
